01 — About

WHO
I AM

Creative and adaptable Web Media senior student at Bahrain Polytechnic with a strong eye for visual storytelling. Motivated to take on challenges, learn quickly, and deliver work that stands out.

From commercial brand promos and product photography to restaurant websites and documentary films — I bring full creative ownership to every project I touch.
